member.name: T:AssessmentApi.Attributes.ExcludeFromClientGenerationAttribute
member.summary: Removes an endpoint or model from the OpenAPI document used for client generation.

member.name: T:AssessmentApi.Attributes.ExcludeModelFromClientGenerationAttribute
member.summary: Marks a schema as internal so generated clients do not expose it.

member.name: T:AssessmentApi.Endpoints.ProductEndpoints
member.summary: Minimal API endpoint mappings for products.

member.name: T:AssessmentApi.Endpoints.InternalHealthResponse
member.summary: Internal health response excluded from generated client contracts.

member.name: T:AssessmentApi.Errors.ApiErrorResponse
member.summary: Standard error body returned for every API error response.

member.name: P:AssessmentApi.Errors.ApiErrorResponse.Timestamp
member.summary: UTC time when the error was created.

member.name: M:AssessmentApi.Errors.ApiErrorResponse.Create(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,System.Int32,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String[]})
member.summary: Creates a standard error response from the current request context.

member.name: T:AssessmentApi.Models.Common.ApiResponse`1
member.summary: Standard success wrapper returned by API endpoints.

member.name: P:AssessmentApi.Models.Common.ApiResponse`1.Success
member.summary: Indicates whether the request completed successfully.

member.name: P:AssessmentApi.Models.Common.ApiResponse`1.TraceId
member.summary: Server-side trace identifier for support and diagnostics.

member.name: T:AssessmentApi.Models.Common.PagedResult`1
member.summary: Generic page wrapper used for list responses.
member.typeparam: The item type in the page.

member.name: P:AssessmentApi.Models.Common.PagedResult`1.PageSize
member.summary: Maximum items returned in a page.

member.name: T:AssessmentApi.Models.Customers.CustomerResponse
member.summary: Customer details returned by the API.

member.name: P:AssessmentApi.Models.Customers.CustomerResponse.IsActive
member.summary: Whether the customer can place new orders.

member.name: P:AssessmentApi.Models.Customers.CustomerResponse.AdvancedProfile
member.summary: Advanced profile model from a long domain namespace.

member.name: T:AssessmentApi.Models.Customers.CustomerInfo
member.summary: Customer information embedded in order responses.

member.name: T:AssessmentApi.Models.Customers.CreateCustomerRequest
member.summary: Request body used to create a new customer.

member.name: P:AssessmentApi.Models.Customers.CustomerProfileInfo.Tier
member.summary: Loyalty tier used for pricing rules.

member.name: T:AssessmentApi.Models.Domain.Inventory.Ordering.Advanced.CustomerProfile.CustomerProfile
member.summary: Advanced customer profile model kept in a deliberately long namespace.

member.name: P:AssessmentApi.Models.Domain.Inventory.Ordering.Advanced.CustomerProfile.CustomerProfile.IsActive
member.summary: Whether advanced ordering rules are enabled.

member.name: T:AssessmentApi.Models.Domain.Inventory.Ordering.Advanced.CustomerProfile.InternalCustomerScore
member.summary: Internal scoring model intentionally excluded from client generation.

member.name: T:AssessmentApi.Models.Orders.OrderResponse
member.summary: Order details returned by the API.

member.name: P:AssessmentApi.Models.Orders.OrderResponse.Priority
member.summary: Order priority where lower values are handled first.

member.name: T:AssessmentApi.Models.Orders.CreateOrderRequest
member.summary: Request body used to create an order.

member.name: P:AssessmentApi.Models.Orders.CreateOrderRequest.Priority
member.summary: Order priority where lower values are handled first.

member.name: P:AssessmentApi.Models.Orders.CreateOrderRequest.Currency
member.summary: Currency used for all order amounts.

member.name: T:AssessmentApi.Models.Orders.CreateOrderItemRequest
member.summary: Product item in a create order request.

member.name: T:AssessmentApi.Models.Orders.ProductItem
member.summary: Product line item in an order response.

member.name: T:AssessmentApi.Models.Products.ProductResponse
member.summary: Product details returned by the API.

member.name: P:AssessmentApi.Models.Products.ProductResponse.Price
member.summary: Unit price in the configured currency.

member.name: P:AssessmentApi.Models.Products.ProductResponse.IsActive
member.summary: Whether the product can be sold.

member.name: T:AssessmentApi.Models.Products.CreateProductRequest
member.summary: Request body used to create a product.

member.name: T:AssessmentApi.OpenApi.ExcludeFromClientGenerationDocumentFilter
member.summary: Removes endpoints and schemas marked as excluded from the generated OpenAPI document.

member.name: T:AssessmentApi.OpenApi.StandardErrorResponsesOperationFilter
member.summary: Adds the standard API error model to common failure responses.
